RoomState.title: RoomState
RoomState.description: The complete current game state of the dilemma match, persisted on host and listened by players and projectors.

timerActive.description: Whether the active countdown timer is ticking

players.description: List of currently registered players, their teams, and cabinet states

redWins.description: Total rounds won by the Red team

whiteWins.description: Total rounds won by the White team

roundHistory.description: Round ledger records, masking the winning team's submitted number

showRoundResult.description: Whether the scoreboard has been opened on the screen

lastUpdated.description: Epoch timestamp when the state changed

mvp.description: List of top performing players by beans remaining

ClientEvent.title: ClientEvent
ClientEvent.description: An asynchronous action triggered by a client device (e.g., student submission or lobby connection) processing through host queue.

playerId.description: Unique identifier of the sending player/tablet

playerName.description: Optional name of the client connecting

timestamp.description: Epoch timestamp of when the event was dispatched

/rooms/{roomCode}.description: Main document retaining the current snapshot of a room's configuration and game state.

/rooms/{roomCode}/events/{eventId}.description: Queue for receiving transactional client submissions to be processed serially by the room's host.
